description: Repair the shapefile at /home/ga/gvsig_data/projects/broken_data/cities_missing_prj.shp, which contains world cities data collected in WGS 84 (EPSG:4326) but is missing its projection (.prj) file. Reproject this layer to Web Mercator (EPSG:3857) and export the result as a valid shapefile to /home/ga/gvsig_data/exports/cities_web_mercator.shp. The final output must include the correct projection definition and coordinates transformed to meters.
